# Quran Audio — Complete Corpus (1–114)

> Quran MP3 collection for all 114 surahs by 17 reciters across 19 range repositories.

## URL Structure

Every audio file lives at path:

```
{range}/{surah_number}/{reciter}/{ayah_number}.mp3
```

### Placeholder definitions

| Placeholder | Meaning | Example | Rules |
|-------------|---------|---------|-------|
| `{range}` | Range directory (git repo) | `1-2` | One of 19 values below |
| `{surah_number}` | Quran surah number | `2` | Integer 1–114 |
| `{reciter}` | Reciter identifier | `ar.shaatree` | One of 17 values below |
| `{ayah_number}` | Verse number within surah | `255` | Integer 1 → max (see table below) |

## Range lookup (surah → range)

To determine which `{range}` to use, look up the surah:

| Range | Surahs | Range | Surahs | Range | Surahs |
|-------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|
| `1-2` | 1–2 | `3-4` | 3–4 | `5-6` | 5–6 |
| `7-8` | 7–8 | `9-10` | 9–10 | `11-12` | 11–12 |
| `13-16` | 13–16 | `17-19` | 17–19 | `20-22` | 20–22 |
| `23-25` | 23–25 | `26-27` | 26–27 | `28-33` | 28–33 |
| `34-37` | 34–37 | `38-42` | 38–42 | `43-50` | 43–50 |
| `51-55` | 51–55 | `56-70` | 56–70 | `71-80` | 71–80 |
| `81-114` | 81–114 |

## Ayah counts per surah

For valid `{ayah_number}` values, use these ranges:

| Surah | Ayahs | Surah | Ayahs | Surah | Ayahs |
|------:|------:|------:|------:|------:|------:|
| 1 | 1–7 | 39 | 1–75 | 77 | 1–50 |
| 2 | 1–286 | 40 | 1–85 | 78 | 1–40 |
| 3 | 1–200 | 41 | 1–54 | 79 | 1–46 |
| 4 | 1–176 | 42 | 1–53 | 80 | 1–42 |
| 5 | 1–120 | 43 | 1–89 | 81 | 1–29 |
| 6 | 1–165 | 44 | 1–59 | 82 | 1–19 |
| 7 | 1–206 | 45 | 1–37 | 83 | 1–36 |
| 8 | 1–75 | 46 | 1–35 | 84 | 1–25 |
| 9 | 1–129 | 47 | 1–38 | 85 | 1–22 |
| 10 | 1–109 | 48 | 1–29 | 86 | 1–17 |
| 11 | 1–123 | 49 | 1–18 | 87 | 1–19 |
| 12 | 1–111 | 50 | 1–45 | 88 | 1–26 |
| 13 | 1–43 | 51 | 1–60 | 89 | 1–30 |
| 14 | 1–52 | 52 | 1–49 | 90 | 1–20 |
| 15 | 1–99 | 53 | 1–62 | 91 | 1–15 |
| 16 | 1–128 | 54 | 1–55 | 92 | 1–21 |
| 17 | 1–111 | 55 | 1–78 | 93 | 1–11 |
| 18 | 1–110 | 56 | 1–96 | 94 | 1–8 |
| 19 | 1–98 | 57 | 1–29 | 95 | 1–8 |
| 20 | 1–135 | 58 | 1–22 | 96 | 1–19 |
| 21 | 1–112 | 59 | 1–24 | 97 | 1–5 |
| 22 | 1–78 | 60 | 1–13 | 98 | 1–8 |
| 23 | 1–118 | 61 | 1–14 | 99 | 1–8 |
| 24 | 1–64 | 62 | 1–11 | 100 | 1–11 |
| 25 | 1–77 | 63 | 1–11 | 101 | 1–11 |
| 26 | 1–227 | 64 | 1–18 | 102 | 1–8 |
| 27 | 1–93 | 65 | 1–12 | 103 | 1–3 |
| 28 | 1–88 | 66 | 1–12 | 104 | 1–9 |
| 29 | 1–69 | 67 | 1–30 | 105 | 1–5 |
| 30 | 1–60 | 68 | 1–52 | 106 | 1–4 |
| 31 | 1–34 | 69 | 1–52 | 107 | 1–7 |
| 32 | 1–30 | 70 | 1–44 | 108 | 1–3 |
| 33 | 1–73 | 71 | 1–28 | 109 | 1–6 |
| 34 | 1–54 | 72 | 1–28 | 110 | 1–3 |
| 35 | 1–45 | 73 | 1–20 | 111 | 1–5 |
| 36 | 1–83 | 74 | 1–56 | 112 | 1–4 |
| 37 | 1–182 | 75 | 1–40 | 113 | 1–5 |
| 38 | 1–88 | 76 | 1–31 | 114 | 1–6 |

## Reciters (17)

```
ar.abdullahbasfar
ar.abdulsamad
ar.abdurrahmaansudais
ar.ahmedajamy
ar.alafasy
ar.aymanswoaid
ar.hanirifai
ar.hudhaify
ar.husary
ar.husarymujawwad
ar.ibrahimakhbar
ar.mahermuaiqly
ar.muhammadayyoub
ar.muhammadjibreel
ar.parhizgar
ar.saoodshuraym
ar.shaatree
```

All reciters have 100% coverage — every surah, every ayah.

## CDN URL construction

Branch is always `main`. Replace `{range}`, `{surah_number}`, `{reciter}`, `{ayah_number}` with actual values.

```
https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/nhridoy/{range}@main/{surah_number}/{reciter}/{ayah_number}.mp3
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nhridoy/{range}/refs/heads/main/{surah_number}/{reciter}/{ayah_number}.mp3
https://cdn.statically.io/gh/nhridoy/{range}@main/{surah_number}/{reciter}/{ayah_number}.mp3
```

### Examples

Surah 2 (Al-Baqarah), ayah 255 (Ayat al-Kursi), recited by Sha'atree:

| CDN | URL |
|-----|-----|
| jsDelivr | `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/nhridoy/1-2@main/2/ar.shaatree/255.mp3` |
| GitHub Raw | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nhridoy/1-2/refs/heads/main/2/ar.shaatree/255.mp3` |
| Statically | `https://cdn.statically.io/gh/nhridoy/1-2@main/2/ar.shaatree/255.mp3` |

Note: surah 2 is in the `1-2` range, so `{range}` = `1-2`.

Surah 1 (Al-Fatihah), ayah 1, recited by Alafasy:

| CDN | URL |
|-----|-----|
| jsDelivr | `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/nhridoy/1-2@main/1/ar.alafasy/1.mp3` |
| GitHub Raw | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nhridoy/1-2/refs/heads/main/1/ar.alafasy/1.mp3` |
| Statically | `https://cdn.statically.io/gh/nhridoy/1-2@main/1/ar.alafasy/1.mp3` |

Surah 112 (Al-Ikhlas), ayah 4, recited by Hudhaify:

| CDN | URL |
|-----|-----|
| jsDelivr | `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/nhridoy/81-114@main/112/ar.hudhaify/4.mp3` |
| GitHub Raw | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nhridoy/81-114/refs/heads/main/112/ar.hudhaify/4.mp3` |
| Statically | `https://cdn.statically.io/gh/nhridoy/81-114@main/112/ar.hudhaify/4.mp3` |

Note: surah 112 is in the `81-114` range, so `{range}` = `81-114`.

## Repository map

Each range has its own GitHub repository:

| Repo | Range |
|------|-------|
| `git@personal:nhridoy/1-2.git` | Surahs 1–2 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/3-4.git` | Surahs 3–4 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/5-6.git` | Surahs 5–6 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/7-8.git` | Surahs 7–8 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/9-10.git` | Surahs 9–10 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/11-12.git` | Surahs 11–12 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/13-16.git` | Surahs 13–16 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/17-19.git` | Surahs 17–19 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/20-22.git` | Surahs 20–22 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/23-25.git` | Surahs 23–25 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/26-27.git` | Surahs 26–27 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/28-33.git` | Surahs 28–33 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/34-37.git` | Surahs 34–37 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/38-42.git` | Surahs 38–42 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/43-50.git` | Surahs 43–50 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/51-55.git` | Surahs 51–55 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/56-70.git` | Surahs 56–70 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/71-80.git` | Surahs 71–80 |
| `git@personal:nhridoy/81-114.git` | Surahs 81–114 |

## Submodule llms.txt

Each submodule (range repo) also has its own `llms.txt` with range-specific details. For example, `./1-2/llms.txt` covers only surahs 1 and 2.
